steps.title: Find the middle position
steps.content:
Add the frequencies:
$$
3+3+4+1+3+9=23
$$
With $23$ observations, the median is the:
$$
\frac{23+1}{2}=12\text{th}
$$
observation.

steps.title: Use cumulative counts
steps.content: The first $3$ observations are $14$, observations $4$ through $6$ are $15$, observations $7$ through $10$ are $16$, and observation $11$ is $17$. The next group, $18$, contains observation $12$.

steps.title: Read the median
steps.content: The $12$th observation is $18$, so the median number of birds is $18$. The answer is 18.
